reasoning: Your primary limiter is lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. In your last ride, your power was at 64% of FTP, indicating a need to push higher intensities while managing fatigue. By targeting over-unders with watt targets slightly below and above your FTP, you'll enhance lactate clearance efficiency, preparing for the demands of the Alpine Loop's consistent climbs.
weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
